body:
### Problem

`nvim --listen` passes its argument to [uv_pipe_bind](https://github.com/neovim/neovim/blob/da58fe8fd27510bb68db91b7d67264737e2279a2/src/nvim/event/socket.c#L165), which passes it to [uv_pipe_bind2](https://github.com/libuv/libuv/blob/44125af62afa285af6fe581dfa2daa3ca85a7983/src/unix/pipe.c#L71) with `flags = 0`, which [truncates the path](https://github.com/libuv/libuv/blob/44125af62afa285af6fe581dfa2daa3ca85a7983/src/unix/pipe.c#L108) if it's too long. The length is platform-dependent, but it's a bit over 100 characters on macOS and Linux. As a result, when passed a too-long path, **the path accessed is truncated silently but the error message is not**, making the error message incorrect.

The workaround is obvious: use a shorter path. But in order to know that this is the workaround, you have to understand that the silent path truncation is going on.

The default value of `$TMPDIR` on macOS is 49 characters; my listen address was simply `$TMPDIR/nvim/${PWD//\//-}` when I encountered this error.

### Steps to reproduce

```
$ nvim --listen /var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/-Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovide-neovide --embed -p
nvim: Failed to --listen: address already in use: "/var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/-Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovide-neovide"
More info with "nvim -h"

$ ls /var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/-Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovide-neovide
"/var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/-Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovide-neovide": No such file or directory (os error 2)

$ ls -l /var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/
srwxr-xr-x@ - rpatterson 31 Mar 10:24 -Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovid
```

### Expected behavior

If nvim called uv_bind_pipe2 directly with UV_PIPE_NO_TRUNCATE, then the error would look something like this.

```
$ nvim --listen /var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/-Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovide-neovide --embed -p
nvim: Failed to --listen: invalid argument: "/var/folders/g7/9y_ydbnj2fs_fvp8xf44p8gc0000gn/T//nvim/-Users-rpatterson-Projects-src-github.com-neovide-neovide"
More info with "nvim -h"
```

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

v0.11.4

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

vim doesn't support --listen

### Operating system/version

macOS 14.8.4 (23J319)

### Terminal name/version

N/A

### $TERM environment variable

N/A

### Installation

macports
title: nvim --listen can show incorrect path in error message
